description_long: This object consists of a group of bedding items, including a large, soft, rectangular pillow in a light gray color, a folded striped comforter or blanket, a flat white sheet or thin mattress, and a rolled-up quilted mat in a muted pink with a subtle geometric pattern. The pillow appears plush and filled with a compressible material, while the comforter is neatly folded and features thin, dark stripes on a light background. The rolled mat has a textured, padded surface, suggesting it is designed for comfort or insulation. All items are arranged closely together, as if prepared for storage or transport. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible stains or damage, and the materials suggest softness and comfort suitable for sleeping or lounging.
description: A neatly arranged set of bedding items including a soft gray pillow, a striped comforter, a white sheet, and a pink quilted mat. The set appears plush, clean, and comfortable.
description_view_0: The view shows the rolled pink quilted mat on the left, the folded striped comforter and white sheet in the center, and the gray pillow partially visible on the right.
description_view_1: The front of the gray pillow is most prominent, with the striped comforter and pink mat stacked behind it.
description_view_2: The gray pillow is on the left, the folded striped comforter and white sheet are in the center, and the rolled pink mat is on the right.
description_view_3: The pink quilted mat is in the foreground, with the folded striped comforter, white sheet, and gray pillow behind it.
